name: glassdoor-stealth
description: Glassdoor is also bot-walled on basic scrapers. Stealth proxy bypasses it — same path as Indeed.

data.markdown:
# Senior Engineer at Acme Corp

**Location:** San Francisco, CA (Hybrid)

## About the role

Acme Corp is hiring a Senior Engineer to join our platform team. You will own core services that power our B2B SaaS product, working closely with product and design to ship high-impact features.

## What you'll do

- Design and implement backend services in Go
- Partner with data engineering on event pipelines
- Own on-call rotation for critical services
- Mentor mid-level engineers and shape engineering culture

## What we're looking for

- 5+ years of backend engineering experience
- Strong systems design and distributed-systems fundamentals
- Experience with Go, Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL
- Excellent written communication
